hyperedges.label: Tick -> Payload -> Redis -> WS broadcast pipeline
Order flow: WS -> ingest -> redis -> worker tick
Simulator map layers (share mapInstance + lifecycle pattern)
Play page bootstrap (session + balance + boat init)
Play HUD cluster (Compass/HUD/Sail share game state)
Map weather overlays (WebGL particles + cursor tooltip)
Nemo Luxury UI Kit (primitives exposed via barrel)
Weather prefetch pipeline (status polling + global + tactical)
Isochrone routing pipeline (wind → candidates → prune → backtrack → schedule)
BoatClass SoT chain (tuple → type → runbook guidance)
External polar ingestion scripts (CSV/XML/VR → Nemo JSON)
